violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the alcohol cooler has an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

The ice machine was observed with an air-break. The ice machine must have an airgap to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The bathroom is lacking a covered toilet receptacle. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
